heading: Annual weaponry report
label: 472 Annual weaponry report
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the appropriation act cited in the credit of this section, and not as part of the Homeland Security Act of 2002 which comprises this chapter.

children.text: the quantity of weapons in inventory at the end of the preceding calendar year, and the amount of weapons, subdivided by weapon type, included in the budget request for each relevant component or agency in the Department of Homeland Security;
a description of how such quantity and purchase aligns to each component or agency’s mission requirements for certification, qualification, training, and operations; and
details on all contracting practices applied by the Department of Homeland Security, including comparative details regarding other contracting options with respect to cost and availability.

children.label: b
children.text: The reports required by subsection (a) shall be submitted in an appropriate format in order to ensure the safety of law enforcement personnel.
